item.title: I made a Bigger, Gayer sword.
item.description:
Sorry for the Pirate Face but it hard to hold one handed.
I seem to remember that it's like... 35lbs? Hardox blade.
The tip of the pommel has been reinforced with hardfacing.
Fluffy cloud guard forge from 1/8" steel.
The Blade is about 55" long, the sword is like.... 75" long?
Here is Video of me making it: https://youtu.be/lSzzB5jc17M
item.dc:creator: michaelcthulhu

item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Warm welcome for the two most hated men in the world
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
I think it would be a fun dnd element that commerce just opened up between your continent and a newly discovered one and it floods the market with potatoes and pineapple and such.
Robin Hood? I was in 6th grade and I was trying HARD not to cry
Me but with cocktail olives. Them MFs had my guts creaking like a pirate ship on the high seas
...all right, I'll elaborate. It's actually two new cultures making first contact, the one from the east is an analog for Spartans. They're peaceful, but their military expertise puts them in the perfect position to become city sentries and body guards. To the west, Mayans just looking to settle. Shit gets hot and heavy when the Spartans stage a coup.
Can you hear the drums, Fernando?
This schmuck with a life gain/token deck. He gets his life up to 50 and uses a sorcery that does 50 damage to me but at the price of 50 life from him. Loses immediately. It would be funnier if it wasn't a 25 minute match where I finally had him on his back foot.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: ICE brutal attack unarmed veteran Portland
item.description: Portland has been standing up to ICE everyday. ICE is not allowed to abuse unarmed citizens expressing their First Amendment rights. Report this violation of ICE's city permit and call to revoke it. Make it impossible to ignore. Contact City Code Enforcement- Call: 503-823-2633 or Email: codec@portlandoregon.gov I am reporting a violation of the Conditional Use Permit for the ICE Facility at 4310 S Macadam Ave. The property's permit requires that they will not pose an unreasonable safety threat for nearby uses and residents. On August 13th 2025 at 10:20PM, DHS agents deployed tear gas and fired less-lethal bullets from the roof at civilians peacefully demonstrating on the public sidewalk. A US military veteran who was standing on the sidewalk and was not blocking any entrances to the facility was violently attacked from behind, assaulted, and was pinned to the ground and made to endure teargas for almost two full minutes as 3 DHS agents lay on top of him. This incident is a clear example of unreasonable safety threats to the public, residents of the neighborhood, the environment, and public Right Of Way. I am requesting that DHS's actions at the ICE facility be investigated as a violation of the facility's permit conditions."
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Azuma cosplay (Azur Lane)
item.description: *Everything you see is pretty much handmade by me (except for the shoes, obviously). The accessories and details were modelled in Blender and then 3D printed. They made for good practice since I have plans to model something quiiite challenging in the near future! (: **You can also find me on: •Reddit: https://reddit.com/u/aniku_ •Instagram: https://instagram.com/anna_himejima_cos •Personal Instagram: https://instagram.com/anna_himejima (out of cosplay)
item.dc:creator: epicinternetgf

item.title: Earth News
item.description: “As an anxious person that thinks about climate change daily, reading Hi, Earth was a bleak, but enjoyable time. This was brilliant. I smiled, I giggled, I chuckled, I laughed my ass off, and then sat there in total darkness as I thought about our society’s demise. The illustration, dialogue, and execution was beautifully done.” –Susan Ha, Goodreads https://warandpeas.shop/collections/books
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: I wasn’t sure how to tell you all…
item.description:
The fosterer taking care of Tony texted me this morning. He didn’t make it. The writing was on the wall when we weighed him yesterday and he had lost 20 grams.
I’m so sorry to have to share this news with you all. RIP Tony. We did everything we could. We will never forget you.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Jaylah - Star Trek Body Paint Cosplay - MCroft07
item.description:
Jaylah from Star Trek - added a reference photo below Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I haven't seen star trek, I just thought the design was pretty cool :) I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) In these videos, it's very difficult to paint at the same time as film because I do not want to smudge the makeup that I've worked on, which is why the brush doesn't always touch. I'm not looking at what I'm doing and in the past I've messed something up. If I don't at least act like I'm brushing, the video looks boring to me. When you're mean to me I block you. If you're disrespectful to me once, I will not tolerate you being disrespectful to me twice. I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m preparing to paint OG Jade from MK next :) I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
the character for those who are unfamiliar :)
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: By digging simple crescent-shaped pits to hold rain, locals in Tanzania are turning the desert green
item.dc:creator: TiondTitu
